text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking around campus, I hear some
excited voices.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Princess, that pose you did in the paddock was so
cool! It was like you were doing a special move!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yes! You looked so confident and beautiful! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Good eyes, you two! You always know just where
to look.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That was my "Noblest of the Nobles" pose. It's a
pose that shows off how noble I am!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
"Noblest of the Nobles" pose?! Holy smokes! Even
the name is cool as hell!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You got any other poses? I definitely wanna see
more!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'd be happy to show you! I am a princess of the
people, after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Which would you like to see? The "Mightiest of
the Mighty" pose or the "Prettiest of the
Princesses" pose?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I mean, of course you should do the...

text_block_list.name: Vodka and Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Mightiest of the Mighty!
Prettiest of the Princesses!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Scarlet, back off! I'm trying to learn how to
get stronger here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! You back off first! I want to learn the
ways of a princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, oh dear. What a pickle we're in...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You over there! Perfect timing! Would you
mind doing us the honor of choosing a pose?
choice_data_list: Do the Prettiest of the Princesses pose.
Mightiest of the Mighty sounds good to me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Very well—then feast your eyes, everyone! My
Prettiest of the Princesses pose looks like... this!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hooo ho ho ho!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is the pose Shining Princess strikes whenever
she's faced with trouble!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Shining Princess is the hero of Princess Fighter,
right? I loved that show when I was a kid!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. There are fewer things more inspiring
than a plucky princess who remembers to stay
graceful no matter what comes her way. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Graceful no matter what... How inspiring. I want
to be like that too—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
EEK! There's a bug on the ground right by my
feet!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Interrupting a conversation between
maidens? You're quite the little pest, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And rude bugs deserve this... HYAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess feeds the bug a knuckle
sandwich!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WA-BAM!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That should do it. Consider our bug problem
addressed.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now we're free to talk to our hearts' content! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Incredible... I think this might be one area where
I'm totally outmatched.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then feast your eyes on my Mightiest of
the Mighty pose!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is the pose Shining Princess strikes whenever
she's whooped a mighty foe!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Shining Princess is the hero of Princess Fighter,
right? I loved that show when I was a kid!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. There are fewer things more inspiring
than a spirited princess who stays brave no matter
what enemy she faces. ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Such a powerful blow! You're so cool!
Can you throw another?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it would be my pleasure. Aaand... HAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She throws out another mighty punch... or so I
expect, but for some reason her jab seems
distinctly weaker than before.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hey now! That's no good at all, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Has praise made you complacent? That punch
had no power behind it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gasp! How could I make a fool of myself in public like this?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm a princess! I'm supposed to be graceful in all things! Oh, the shame! The embarrassment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Uh? What was so embarrassing?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Who knows?
